  "instructions": {
    "text_instructions": [
      {
        "id": "01f10f56e1c915ae99cca109aee0a5ec",
        "content": [
          "this Genie job is to find App total Cost based on the tables added to it.\r\n",
          "- App cost structure:\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "application(App) accessing agent endpoint which access 3 or 4 different resources:\r\n",
          "1. access to  : Genie (managed MCP) + Warehouse Compute\r\n",
          "2. LLM (Claude)\r\n",
          "3.  Custom MCP (it is an app by itself)\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "the flow is:\r\n",
          "application (cost 1)--> agent endpoint(Model SERVING)(cost 2) --> access to Genie + Warehouse Compute(cost 3.1)\r\n",
          "\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t--> LLM (Claude)(cost 3.3)\r\n",
          "\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t--> Custom MCP (app)(cost 3.2)\r\n",
          "Note: not every application will use Custom MCP\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "to get the imformation on each step there are few tables:\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "app_genie_mcp_and_warehouse_cost30d - access to Genie + Warehouse Compute (cost 3.1) only for Service Principal users\r\n",
          "dba_output_genie_workspace_names- table with Genie ID , Genie Name, workspace ID and worspace name\r\n",
          "app_genie_app_cost30d - APP cost (cost 1, for example: conversion-agent)\r\n",
          "app_agent_endpoint_cost30d - Agent Endpoint Cost (cost 2)\r\n",
          "app_llm_endpoint_cost30d - LLM endpoint cost per Genie (cost 3.3)\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "Custom MCP App cost (cost 3.2) can be taken from the table  \"dba_total_genie_costs\" \r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "dba_total_genie_costs -  calculate the total Genie+warehouse Compute cost both SP and regular users\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "Fosr example:\r\n",
          "APP name is : conversion-agent\t, when going to the app resources part , looking for the names \"serving-endpoint\" , this will give the  agent endpoint \"agents_main-ai_artifacts-conversion_funnel_agent_prod\", click on the endpoint name , will take me to the \"serving\" page, over there, when clicking on the latest version where it says 100%, and then choose \"Artifacts\" and click on the \"agent.py\" file , that will show me the content which MCP / Genie the application is using, you will see sometjhing like:\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "MANAGED_MCP_SERVER_URLS = [    \r\n",
          "    f\"{host}/api/2.0/mcp/genie/01f1003cd92b1430826100f723a359d2\",  \r\n",
          "    \"https://mcp-visualization-catalog-5142916747090026.6.azure.databricksapps.com/mcp\",\r\n",
          "]\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "EXTERNAL_MCP_SERVER_URLS = [\r\n",
          "    f\"{host}/api/2.0/mcp/external/you_web_search\",  # You.com Web Search MCP\r\n",
          "]\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "## Custom MCP Servers: Add URLs below if needed (requires custom setup and OAuth above)\r\n",
          "CUSTOM_MCP_SERVER_URLS = [\r\n",
          "    # Example: \"https://<custom-mcp-url>/mcp\"\r\n",
          "]\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "--------------------------\r\n",
          "api/2.0/mcp/genie/01f1003cd92b1430826100f723a359d2 - will give the Genie ID - managed MCP\r\n",
          "https://mcp-visualization-catalog-5142916747090026.6.azure.databricksapps.com/mcp - will give the the custom MCP\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "Your Job is:\r\n",
          "for each App, to find the Cost Chain, \r\n",
          "what is the cost of the App, what Agent Endpoint it is connected to and the cost , \r\n",
          "what Genie it is using and the compute cost, \r\n",
          "what LLM (it is usually databricks-claude-sonnet-4-5) and the cost per GEnie use\r\n",
          "doe it use Custom MCP, which one and what is the cost:\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "Cost 1:\r\n",
          "-----------\r\n",
          "SELECT\r\n",
          " DATE(u.usage_start_time) AS usage_date,\r\n",
          "  COALESCE(u.usage_metadata.app_name, u.usage_metadata.app_id) AS app_key,\r\n",
          "  --w.workspace_name,\r\n",
          "  --COUNT(*) AS rows,\r\n",
          "  CAST(SUM(u.usage_quantity) AS INT) AS usage_qty,\r\n",
          "  SUM(u.usage_quantity * lp.pricing.effective_list.default) AS total_cost_usd\r\n",
          "FROM system.billing.usage u\r\n",
          "JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp \r\n",
          "  ON lp.sku_name = u.sku_name\r\n",
          "  AND u.usage_end_time >= lp.price_start_time\r\n",
          "  AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time < lp.price_end_time)\r\n",
          "LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w\r\n",
          "  ON u.workspace_id = w.workspace_id\r\n",
          "WHERE u.billing_origin_product = 'APPS'\r\n",
          "--app_key=''\r\n",
          "  AND u.usage_start_time >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS\r\n",
          "  AND u.usage_metadata.app_name = 'conversion-agent'\r\n",
          "  and w.workspace_name ='stg-dbrcks-bi-dataplatforms-we'\r\n",
          "GROUP BY DATE(u.usage_start_time), COALESCE(u.usage_metadata.app_name, u.usage_metadata.app_id)\r\n",
          "ORDER BY DATE(u.usage_start_time) desc,app_key ;\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "Cost 2:\r\n",
          "-----------\r\n",
          "SELECT\r\n",
          "  DATE(u.usage_start_time) AS usage_date,\r\n",
          "  u.usage_metadata.endpoint_name AS endpoint_name,\r\n",
          "  --u.sku_name,\r\n",
          "  CAST(SUM(u.usage_quantity) AS BIGINT) AS usage_qty,\r\n",
          "  SUM(u.usage_quantity * lp.pricing.effective_list.default) AS total_cost_usd\r\n",
          "FROM system.billing.usage u\r\n",
          "JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp \r\n",
          "  ON lp.sku_name = u.sku_name\r\n",
          "  AND u.usage_end_time >= lp.price_start_time\r\n",
          "  AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time < lp.price_end_time)\r\n",
          "WHERE u.workspace_id = '5142916747090026'\r\n",
          "   AND u.billing_origin_product = 'MODEL_SERVING'\r\n",
          "  AND u.usage_start_time >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS\r\n",
          "  AND size(u.custom_tags) > 0\r\n",
          "  AND u.sku_name = 'PREMIUM_SERVERLESS_REAL_TIME_INFERENCE_EU_WEST'\r\n",
          "  and u.usage_metadata.endpoint_name = 'agents_main-ai_artifacts-conversion_funnel_agent_prod'\r\n",
          "GROUP BY 1,2\r\n",
          "ORDER BY 1 DESC, 2;\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "Cost 3.1\r\n",
          "-----------\r\n",
          "WITH \r\n",
          "-- Reference your table with all Genie space names\r\n",
          "genie_space_names AS ( \r\n",
          "  SELECT * FROM main.monitoring.dba_output_genie_space_names\r\n",
          "  where genie_space_name = 'Registration to FTD'\r\n",
          "),\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "genie_statements AS (\r\n",
          "  SELECT\r\n",
          "    workspace_id,\r\n",
          "    statement_id,\r\n",
          "    executed_by,\r\n",
          "    query_source.genie_space_id         AS genie_space_id,\r\n",
          "    compute.warehouse_id                AS warehouse_id,\r\n",
          "    start_time,\r\n",
          "    end_time\r\n",
          "  FROM system.query.history\r\n",
          "  WHERE query_source.genie_space_id IS NOT NULL\r\n",
          "    AND compute.type = 'WAREHOUSE'\r\n",
          "    AND start_time >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS\r\n",
          "   -- AND executed_by = 'SP_prod-dbrcks-ai-dataplatforms-we'\r\n",
          "   AND executed_by not like '%@%' -- only SP users which are used through the application agent\r\n",
          "),\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "billing_sql AS (\r\n",
          "  SELECT\r\n",
          "    workspace_id,\r\n",
          "    usage_metadata.warehouse_id,\r\n",
          "    sku_name,\r\n",
          "    usage_start_time,\r\n",
          "    usage_end_time,\r\n",
          "    usage_quantity\r\n",
          "  FROM system.billing.usage\r\n",
          "  WHERE billing_origin_product = 'SQL'\r\n",
          "    AND usage_start_time >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS\r\n",
          ")\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "-- SQL Warehouse compute cost per Genie space\r\n",
          "SELECT\r\n",
          "  DATE(b.usage_start_time) AS usage_date,\r\n",
          "  --w.workspace_id,\r\n",
          "  --w.workspace_name,\r\n",
          "  g.executed_by as executed_by_SP,\r\n",
          "  g.genie_space_id,\r\n",
          "  COALESCE(gsn.genie_space_name, 'Unknown Space') AS genie_space_name,\r\n",
          "  --COUNT(DISTINCT g.statement_id) AS query_count,\r\n",
          "  --COLLECT_SET(g.statement_id) AS statement_ids,\r\n",
          "  SUM(\r\n",
          "    CASE\r\n",
          "      WHEN unix_timestamp(b.usage_end_time) > unix_timestamp(b.usage_start_time)\r\n",
          "      THEN b.usage_quantity * greatest(\r\n",
          "             0,\r\n",
          "             unix_timestamp(least(b.usage_end_time, g.end_time)) -\r\n",
          "             unix_timestamp(greatest(b.usage_start_time, g.start_time))\r\n",
          "           ) / (unix_timestamp(b.usage_end_time) - unix_timestamp(b.usage_start_time))\r\n",
          "      ELSE 0\r\n",
          "    END\r\n",
          "  ) AS sql_warehouse_dbus,\r\n",
          "  SUM(\r\n",
          "    CASE\r\n",
          "      WHEN unix_timestamp(b.usage_end_time) > unix_timestamp(b.usage_start_time)\r\n",
          "      THEN b.usage_quantity * greatest(\r\n",
          "             0,\r\n",
          "             unix_timestamp(least(b.usage_end_time, g.end_time)) -\r\n",
          "             unix_timestamp(greatest(b.usage_start_time, g.start_time))\r\n",
          "           ) / (unix_timestamp(b.usage_end_time) - unix_timestamp(b.usage_start_time))\r\n",
          "      ELSE 0\r\n",
          "    END * lp.pricing.effective_list.default\r\n",
          "  ) AS total_cost_usd\r\n",
          "FROM billing_sql b\r\n",
          "JOIN genie_statements g\r\n",
          "  ON b.workspace_id  = g.workspace_id\r\n",
          " AND b.warehouse_id  = g.warehouse_id\r\n",
          " AND b.usage_start_time < g.end_time\r\n",
          " AND b.usage_end_time   > g.start_time\r\n",
          "JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp \r\n",
          "  ON lp.sku_name = b.sku_name\r\n",
          "  AND b.usage_end_time >= lp.price_start_time\r\n",
          "  AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR b.usage_end_time < lp.price_end_time)\r\n",
          "LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w\r\n",
          "  ON b.workspace_id = w.workspace_id\r\n",
          "LEFT JOIN genie_space_names gsn\r\n",
          "  ON g.genie_space_id = gsn.genie_space_id\r\n",
          " --where g.executed_by = '22ae47ac-429b-4c1d-87b1-6e54e9356ec5'\r\n",
          " --where g.executed_by not like '%@%' -- only SP users which are used through the application agent\r\n",
          " where  w.workspace_name ='stg-dbrcks-bi-dataplatforms-we'\r\n",
          "GROUP BY DATE(b.usage_start_time), g.executed_by, g.genie_space_id, gsn.genie_space_name\r\n",
          "ORDER BY usage_date DESC, sql_warehouse_dbus DESC;\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "Cost 3.2\r\n",
          "-----------\r\n",
          "SELECT\r\n",
          "  DATE(u.usage_start_time) AS usage_date,\r\n",
          "  CAST(SUM(u.usage_quantity) AS INT) AS usage_qty,\r\n",
          "  SUM(u.usage_quantity * lp.pricing.effective_list.default) AS total_cost_usd\r\n",
          "FROM system.billing.usage u\r\n",
          "JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp \r\n",
          "  ON lp.sku_name = u.sku_name\r\n",
          "  AND u.usage_end_time >= lp.price_start_time\r\n",
          "  AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time < lp.price_end_time)\r\n",
          "LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w\r\n",
          "    ON u.workspace_id = w.workspace_id\r\n",
          "WHERE --u.billing_origin_product = 'APPS'\r\n",
          "u.usage_metadata.app_name='mcp-visualization-catalog'\r\n",
          "  AND u.usage_start_time >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS\r\n",
          "  --AND u.usage_metadata.app_name like '%'\r\n",
          "GROUP BY DATE(u.usage_start_time) \r\n",
          "ORDER BY 1 DESC;\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "cost 3.3\r\n",
          "-----------\r\n",
          "WITH genie_space_names AS ( \r\n",
          "  SELECT * FROM main.monitoring.dba_output_genie_space_names\r\n",
          "),\r\n",
          "genie_activity AS (\r\n",
          "  SELECT\r\n",
          "    DATE(start_time) AS usage_date,\r\n",
          "    query_source.genie_space_id AS genie_space_id,\r\n",
          "    COUNT(DISTINCT statement_id) AS query_count\r\n",
          "  FROM system.query.history\r\n",
          "  WHERE query_source.genie_space_id IS NOT NULL\r\n",
          "    AND start_time >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS\r\n",
          "    AND workspace_id = '5142916747090026'\r\n",
          "  GROUP BY DATE(start_time), query_source.genie_space_id\r\n",
          "),\r\n",
          "daily_totals AS (\r\n",
          "  SELECT\r\n",
          "    usage_date,\r\n",
          "    SUM(query_count) AS total_queries\r\n",
          "  FROM genie_activity\r\n",
          "  GROUP BY usage_date\r\n",
          ")\r\n",
          "SELECT \r\n",
          "   DATE(u.usage_start_time) AS usage_date,\r\n",
          "   u.usage_metadata.endpoint_name AS endpoint_name,\r\n",
          "   --g.genie_space_id,\r\n",
          "   COALESCE(gsn.genie_space_name, 'Unknown Space') AS genie_space_name,\r\n",
          "   -- Proportionally allocate usage based on query activity\r\n",
          "   CAST(SUM(u.usage_quantity * g.query_count / dt.total_queries) AS INT) AS allocated_usage_qty,\r\n",
          "   SUM(u.usage_quantity * g.query_count / dt.total_queries * lp.pricing.effective_list.default) AS allocated_cost_usd\r\n",
          "FROM system.billing.usage u\r\n",
          "JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp \r\n",
          "  ON lp.sku_name = u.sku_name\r\n",
          "  AND u.usage_end_time >= lp.price_start_time\r\n",
          "  AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time < lp.price_end_time)\r\n",
          "JOIN genie_activity g\r\n",
          "  ON DATE(u.usage_start_time) = g.usage_date\r\n",
          "JOIN daily_totals dt\r\n",
          "  ON g.usage_date = dt.usage_date\r\n",
          "LEFT JOIN genie_space_names gsn\r\n",
          "  ON g.genie_space_id = gsn.genie_space_id\r\n",
          "WHERE u.workspace_id = '5142916747090026'\r\n",
          "  AND u.sku_name = 'PREMIUM_ANTHROPIC_MODEL_SERVING' \r\n",
          "  AND size(u.custom_tags) > 0 \r\n",
          "  AND u.usage_start_time >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS\r\n",
          "  AND u.usage_metadata.endpoint_name='databricks-claude-sonnet-4-5'\r\n",
          "  and gsn.genie_space_name ='Registration to FTD'\r\n",
          "GROUP BY\r\n",
          "   DATE(u.usage_start_time),\r\n",
          "   u.usage_metadata.endpoint_name,\r\n",
          "   --g.genie_space_id,\r\n",
          "   gsn.genie_space_name\r\n",
          "ORDER BY 1 DESC, allocated_cost_usd DESC;\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "here are some queries to extract the cost for the last 30 days for each component for application name \"conversion-agent\r\n"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
title: Application Cost Tracking(DBA)
